items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You...

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Don't worry. {PlayerName} is special. The Temporal Dusruption can't hurt {Male=him;Female=her}.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I... *cough*... but Changli, your...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Shh...

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: I gave my word to be your pawn and I intend to keep it. As your teacher and courtier, it is only right for me to do so.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: And let's not forget, without me playing the Wayfinder for {PlayerName}, we wouldn't even have {Male=him;Female=her} here.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: {PlayerName} has a strong connection to this place. You need {Male=his;Female=her} help to resolve Mt. Firmament's crisis.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: But... We already owe {PlayerName} a lot.

options.text: I don't mind helping you again.
I'm here to find out about my past.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Thank you, {PlayerName}... Thank you.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: As we headed toward Mt. Firmament, {PlayerName} mentioned a strange dream {Male=he;Female=she} had. It may have been a flashback of {Male=his;Female=her} lost memories.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: {PlayerName}, Jué, and Mt. Firmament... There must be some kind of crucial connection between the three. {PlayerName} also has {Male=his;Female=her} own reasons for being here.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I see...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: {PlayerName}, I will do everything I can to rescue the Sentinel as soon as possible, then we can finally talk to it in person. It will surely have the answers you want.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Let's cut to the chase.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: What did you find in Truthseeker's Pass, Jinhsi?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: According to the Court of Savantae's records... the Sentinel was already injured upon its arrival at Mt. Firmament.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: As time passed and its condition worsened, the flow of time became unstable here, causing Temporal Disruptions that could potentially threaten Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Only the Sentinel's Appointed Resonator can restore its <ano=ability to control time>Temporal Mandate</ano>...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Their records indicate a solution.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: To reverse the rapid aging effect from Temporal Disruptions, I must deliberately collide with the Sentinel's Resonance power during combat—triggering my Second Resonance Awakening. That will enhance my power beyond its limits.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Let's say you can achieve all that, but Jinhsi... Do you understand what is at stake for yourself?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I understand.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...I share a Resonance connection with Jué, but I never took the time to truly get to know it... I've been blind to its suffering for so long...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Sentinel Jué has been guiding us since the city's founding with its wise words and well-crafted decisions.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The Temporal Disruptions we face are just a side effect of its efforts to protect local people.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...Without the Sentinel blocking out Tacet Discords through its time-manipulation power, Jinzhou would be a barren wasteland today.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: So what do you plan to do, Jinhsi?

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: If the Sentinel's condition is indeed incurable... Nobody knows how far the Temporal Disruptions will continue to spread.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Today it's Mt. Firmament, but tomorrow it could be all of Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I... I will...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: If it truly comes down to that, I'll fulfill Jué's prophecy myself.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: It's the only way to save Mt Firmament, protect Jinzhou, and help the Sentinel.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Have you thought about the consequences, Jinhsi?

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Trying to trigger a Second Awakening by fighting the Sentinel... It could make you Overclock at any moment.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: We both know what that means. You could lose your mind forever, or even disintegrate into dust... You don't want to end up like those Chronosorters, shredded under immense pressure.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: On top of that... Do you honestly believe you can fight in your current condition?

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: I can see right through your façade, Jinhsi. You're essentially committing suicide at this point.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You're one to talk, my teacher.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I learned from the best. When have you ever backed down from risking your life for what you believe in?

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Oh? I don't remember ever teaching you that.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: We all die eventually, but we need to stay alive as long as we can to achieve more.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Jinhsi, you must live and inherit the Sentinel's power. Then you can save and protect these people for years to come.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Changli... I...

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: ... Jinhsi, I don't intend to stop you. I know you've made up your mind.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: That's why I brought {PlayerName} here.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: You may have already guessed it. {PlayerName} is indeed the hero who fought by our Sentinel's side during Jinzhou's early days. {Male=He;Female=She} is also the mysterious visitor spoken of in tales about Mt. Firmament.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: All evidence we've gathered points to this being true.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: If anyone can help us with the situation at Mt. Firmament, it must be {PlayerName}.

options.text: I don't remember anything, but I can fight.
I'm strong. It wouldn't hurt to help.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Thank you, my teacher... Jinhsi will keep your words in mind.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Lastly, we still don't know for sure how the Fractsidus is keeping our Sentinel trapped. This will determine if you can actually meet it face to face.

options.text: Maybe the Fractsidus are just really strong...
They might be using the Court of Savantae's mechanisms.
Maybe they manipulated the Sentinel's weakness.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Yes, it could be any of these scenarios. Lady Xinyi is already on the case. We should get an answer soon.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: The Cipher Key should be inside the stone chamber, behind its entrance gate. There is one more Flare Stone to work out. Let's get moving.
